reviewer: weekly-hardening-routine (headless Chromium 141 via CDP; no chrome-devtools-mcp in cloud env)

spec_match.rationale: Exercises real setAppBadge/clearAppBadge and pairs each resolution with live Notification.permission — exactly the new macOS gate.

interactive.rationale: All three badge calls verified resolving in headless Chromium with the gate messaging.

edge_cases.rationale: Missing-API, rejection, and silent-no-render cases all covered in copy and code.

runtime_evidence.rationale: CDP run of set/flag/clear with screenshot inspected.

accessibility.rationale: role=log live region, numeric input labelled.

summary: The silent permission gate is made visible by pairing real calls with permission state.
